message:
refactor: Consolidate GPU code to use chunked implementations only

Remove original GPU files and use chunked implementations as single code path.
This provides memory-safe processing for large datasets while maintaining
backward-compatible APIs.

Changes:
- Add topK(), computeDistances(), searchSimple() to ChunkedGPUVectorSearch
- Add backward-compatible aliases (GPUJoiner, GPUSorter, GPUGrouper, etc.)
- Add shouldUseGPU* functions to chunked modules
- Delete gpu-joins.js, gpu-sort.js, gpu-group-by.js, gpu-vector-search.js
- Update index.js to export from chunked modules with original names
